construct_verdict_reason: Most items measure self-assessed knowledge (self-efficacy), but p28_1 and p36_1 measure actual knowledge/recall rather than perceived competence.

items.reason: Directly measures self-assessed understanding of environmental problem causes on a 0-10 scale, aligned with construct definition.
Directly measures self-assessed understanding of environmental solutions on a 0-10 scale, aligned with construct definition.
Measures actual ability to recall/mention renewable energy sources, not perceived knowledge competence; this is objective knowledge, not self-efficacy.
Directly measures self-assessed knowledge level regarding renewable energy on a 0-10 scale, aligned with construct definition.
Measures actual knowledge of climate change causes through open-ended recall, not perceived competence; this is objective knowledge, not self-efficacy.
